criticalRules: Thickness specified as '1 1 1 1 1 1 1 1' for each curve
Axis limits use space 'min max' format not [min;max]
description: 3D XY scope for 3D trajectory and parametric curve visualization
anomalies: Space-separated values in exprs for arrays
exprs[6-8] use space-separated format for min/max pairs
name: CSCOPXY3D
